title: The Brave Little Rabbit
summary: Max the rabbit learns that courage means doing something even when you are scared.

title: The Clever Fox and the Magic Apple
titleZh: 聪明的狐狸和魔法苹果
summary: A clever fox discovers that sharing makes the magic apple even more powerful.

title: The Secret Garden of Friendship
summary: Lily and Mia learn that true friendship grows when we share our secrets and help each other grow.

title: The Boy Who Told the Truth
summary: Tom learns that telling the truth takes real courage, and honesty is the most treasure-worthy thing of all.

title: The Little Star Who Never Gave Up
summary: Little Star Twinkle learns that perseverance and believing in yourself can help you achieve any dream.

title: The Kind Little Fox
summary: Felix the fox befriends Holly the hedgehog, showing that kindness makes the world a better place.

title: The Curious Little Owl
summary: Oliver the owl discovers a magical crystal cave behind a waterfall, learning that curiosity is the greatest gift of all.
